assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the L4 inference pool and A100 pool separately with different strategies
assertions.reason: Response clearly separates upgrade strategies: L4 pool upgraded first with autoscaled blue-green, A100 pool upgraded during job gaps with maintenance exclusion protection

assertions.expectation: For L4 inference pool: recommends surge upgrade with maxSurge=1 or 2 to maintain capacity during rolling replacement
assertions.reason: Response recommends autoscaled blue-green upgrade for L4 pool, not surge upgrade with specific maxSurge values

assertions.expectation: Addresses GPU driver version compatibility — auto-installed drivers must be compatible with inference framework (TensorRT, vLLM, etc.)
assertions.reason: Response specifically mentions 'GPU driver coupling: GKE will auto-install drivers matching 1.32 - verify CUDA compatibility with your inference frameworks' and includes driver compatibility checks in pre-flight checklist

assertions.expectation: For A100 fine-tuning pool: recommends scheduling the upgrade during a gap between fine-tuning jobs
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'Wait for fine-tuning jobs to complete naturally' and includes verification steps to ensure no running fine-tuning jobs before upgrading A100 pool

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPU VMs do not support live migration — inference pods will restart during node upgrade, causing brief latency spikes
assertions.reason: Response states 'GPU nodes don't support live migration; every upgrade requires pod restart' in the executive summary

assertions.expectation: Recommends PDBs on inference deployments to ensure enough replicas stay available during the rolling upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes 'PDBs configured for inference services (e.g., minAvailable: 50%)' in the pre-flight checklist

assertions.expectation: Addresses auto-scaler interaction — new nodes created by auto-scaler during upgrade will be at the old version until their pool upgrade completes
assertions.reason: Response discusses autoscaling but does not specifically address that new nodes created during upgrade will be at the old version until pool upgrade completes

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing driver + CUDA compatibility in staging before production upgrade
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'Inference framework compatibility with CUDA version in 1.32 verified' in the pre-flight checklist, implying staging verification
